creator: frank@dynamical-systems.org
text:
Sorry for the delayed reply. I tried to find out what's wrong and detected 
a number of unexplainable case conversions which must have occurred while 
sending the PR. Below find a patch to be applied to the uuencoded part of 
the original PR. This worked for me, so I think it's ok now.

Regards,
Frank Josellis


--- patch begins here ---

+++ linux_base-slackware	Mon Jan 15 20:24:46 2007
